case_title: WAREEWAN PONGSAROJ VS. NICOLE WALTON ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON BOTH DEFENDANTS. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
